## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Styling / UI change
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## How was this tested?

Describe how you tested the change (browsers checked, `pytest` run, manual QA steps, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pytest` and all tests pass
- [ ] I ran `ruff check .` and `black --check .` with no issues
- [ ] I rebuilt CSS with `npm run build` if I touched `input.css`
- [ ] I tested light **and** dark mode
- [ ] I updated documentation (README/CONTRIBUTING) if needed
